routes.example_prompt: Check the SSystems plugin and routing contract before changing this workflow.
routes.intent: Route SSystems plugin, skill, hook, and contract work through the canonical contract.
routes.review_gate: Run registry and hook checks before completion.

routes.example_prompt: Write an Upwork freelance proposal for this client post.
routes.intent: Turn a marketplace opportunity into a reviewed proposal or next action.
routes.review_gate: Final Human Pass before showing or sending a proposal.

routes.example_prompt: Build a cold email sequence for this direct B2B lead.
routes.intent: Plan or execute direct B2B client acquisition from real signals and proof.
routes.review_gate: Final Human Pass before showing copy as final.

routes.example_prompt: Tailor my resume for this job application.
routes.intent: Tailor a truthful application or resume angle.
routes.review_gate: Verify claims against source proof before final.

routes.example_prompt: Write a casual cover note for this application.
routes.intent: Write a short, human note for an application or reply.

routes.example_prompt: Turn this Eagle proof asset into a portfolio block.
routes.intent: Turn a real asset into a proof block or claim.
routes.review_gate: Verify the asset and claim source before publishing.

routes.example_prompt: Turn this project screenshot into a LinkedIn proof content idea.
routes.intent: Turn real proof into useful offer-aligned content.

routes.example_prompt: Add this as an Opportunity HQ task and choose the right page shape.
routes.intent: Shape durable project or task work before mutation.
routes.review_gate: Show task shape before mutation unless directly requested.

routes.example_prompt: Route this raw workflow idea before turning it into a task.
routes.intent: Classify a mixed idea and choose its owner surface.
routes.review_gate: Do not mutate a live surface until owner and next action are clear.

routes.example_prompt: Plan the focused career and outreach dashboard for the active week.
routes.intent: Define the seven-day review surface and its owner-backed dashboard contract.
routes.review_gate: Create the Paper frame only after Paper Desktop is connected; keep task state in its owners.

routes.example_prompt: Plan the authenticated Linear GraphQL gateway for Shortcuts and Raycast.
routes.intent: Define the shared server-side create or update action for Shortcuts, Raycast, and Codex.
routes.review_gate: Keep credentials server-side and verify one create-or-update flow before building Shortcut clients.

routes.example_prompt: Update the LikeC4 architecture map for this workflow.
routes.intent: Create or update a reviewed visual system map.
routes.review_gate: Validate the source map and human-readable output.

routes.example_prompt: Tighten the offer wording on the Singleton Systems landing page.
routes.intent: Make an offer or site decision from the Singleton Systems business model.
routes.review_gate: Use real proof and Final Human Pass for publishable copy.

routes.example_prompt: Find and organize this asset in the Eagle library.
routes.review_gate: Verify the selected asset before changing metadata.

skills.reason: Client video job storyboard prep with Eagle assets, transcript decisions, and Premiere MCP bin setup.
Eagle operator contract; exposed as s-systems:eagle.

capabilities.evidence: The versioned repo source is canonical; verify the installed plugin after each release.
The PDF runtime path is versioned and must be discovered from the live plugin list before a path claim.
Homebrew prefix is machine-specific; discover it on use rather than storing a fixed path.
Package binaries may be repo-local rather than global PATH commands.
